name: Poppyseed Poundcake Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together flour, poppyseeds, salt and baking soda.
2. In a large bowl, cream together sugar and butter. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
3. Beat in yogurt and vanilla until well blended.
4. Stir in the flour mixture until moistened thoroughly.
5. Spoon batter into greased muffin tins.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
